texto: Her husband and her children did not consider her beyond criticism. She belonged to them; whatever she did affected them; their pride, their good name in the world lay in her hands. They would give her love, protection, even a sort of homage, but in return for that she must be what they wanted and needed her to be.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Elisabeth Sanxay Holding sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Her husband and her children did not consider her beyond criticism. She belonged to them; whateve…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, mothers, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
